features: Softer-than-Silk Fibers: The Cleansing Face Wipes are made with ultra-soft fibers that provide a gentle touch on the skin while effectively removing makeup, dirt, and oil without irritation.
Effective Makeup Removal: These wipes are tough on makeup, including waterproof mascara, effortlessly wiping away even the most stubborn cosmetics without the need for harsh scrubbing.

Hydrating and Nourishing Formula: Enriched with skin-loving ingredients like Vitamin B5 and Vitamin E, these wipes not only cleanse but also hydrate and nourish your skin, leaving it feeling refreshed and moisturized.

Aqua-Lock Technology: Innovative Aqua-Lock technology prevents the wipes from drying out, ensuring every wipe remains fresh and effective from the first to the last, making each one ready to use whenever you need it.

Gentle on Sensitive Skin: Dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic, these wipes are specially formulated for sensitive skin, containing no harsh chemicals, artificial perfumes, or alcohol that could irritate or dry out the skin.

Convenient for On-the-Go Use: With their quick and easy application, these wipes are perfect for use at home, in your makeup bag, gym bag, or on the go, providing a fast and effective cleansing solution wherever you are.
description: Product description Cleansing Face Wipes offer a gentle yet highly effective way to cleanse your skin, remove makeup, and refresh your complexion. These wipes are made with softer-than-silk fibers, providing a soothing touch that’s tough on makeup but kind to your skin. Formulated to remove oil, impurities, and even waterproof mascara, these wipes are a convenient and quick solution for your skincare needs. Whether you're at home, at the gym, or on the go, these face wipes are the perfect addition to any makeup bag, fitness kit, or bathroom for a simple, refreshing cleanse. Designed for sensitive skin, Face Wipes are free from harsh chemicals, artificial perfumes, and alcohol, ensuring they don’t irritate or dry out your skin. Instead, they leave your face feeling clean, fresh, and instantly hydrated. Enriched with skin-loving ingredients like Vitamin B5 and Vitamin E, these wipes help nourish and hydrate your skin while effectively removing makeup and dirt. s Aqua-Lock technology keeps every wipe fresh from the first to the last, ensuring they don't dry out. Each wipe is just as effective at cleansing, even after multiple uses from the pack. Dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic, these wipes are safe for all skin types, especially sensitive skin. They are a perfect part of your daily cleansing routine or for use as a makeup remover without leaving any greasy residue behind. Winner of the Look Beauty Award for Best Face Wipes, Cleansing Face Wipes are designed with your sensitive skin in mind. For best results, use them day or night by gently wiping over your face, eyelids, neck, and lips. For stubborn mascara, simply hold the wipe over the area for a few seconds before wiping clean. Directions Gently wipe the Cleansing Face Wipes over your face, including your eyelids, neck, and lips, to remove makeup, dirt, and impurities. No need to rinse after use. Reseal the pack to prevent the wipes from drying out. Dispose of used wipes in the trash. Do not flush. Safety Warning For external use only: Avoid direct contact with eyes. If the product gets into your eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation or rash occurs, and consult a healthcare professional if necessary. Keep out of reach of children: These wipes are not intended for use by children without supervision. In case of accidental ingestion, seek immediate medical attention. See more
